'''鈭歝h-f-z''' ('''kachafaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yiffpile|yiffpile]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-f-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yiffpile|yiffpile]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-f-z
|-
! Lemma
| kachafaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichafaz|thichafaz]] || [[word:jichafaz|jichafaz]] || [[word:shichafaz|shichafaz]] || [[word:kichafaz|kichafaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchafaz|thuthuchafaz]] || [[word:jujuchafaz|jujuchafaz]] || [[word:shushuchafaz|shushuchafaz]] || [[word:kukuchafaz|kukuchafaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchafaz|thuchafaz]] || [[word:juchafaz|juchafaz]] || [[word:shuchafaz|shuchafaz]] || [[word:kuchafaz|kuchafaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchafaz|thuchafaz]] || [[word:juchafaz|juchafaz]] || [[word:shuchafaz|shuchafaz]] || [[word:kuchafaz|kuchafaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechafaz|thechafaz]] || [[word:jechafaz|jechafaz]] || [[word:shechafaz|shechafaz]] || [[word:kechafaz|kechafaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochafaz|thothochafaz]] || [[word:jojochafaz|jojochafaz]] || [[word:shoshochafaz|shoshochafaz]] || [[word:kokochafaz|kokochafaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochafaz|thochafaz]] || [[word:jochafaz|jochafaz]] || [[word:shochafaz|shochafaz]] || [[word:kochafaz|kochafaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochafaz|thochafaz]] || [[word:jochafaz|jochafaz]] || [[word:shochafaz|shochafaz]] || [[word:kochafaz|kochafaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chafaz|chafaz]] || [[word:chafaz|chafaz]] || [[word:chafaz|chafaz]] || [[word:chafaz|chafaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chafaz|chafaz]] || [[word:chafaz|chafaz]] || [[word:chafaz|chafaz]] || [[word:chafaz|chafaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chafaz|chafaz]] || [[word:chafaz|chafaz]] || [[word:chafaz|chafaz]] || [[word:chafaz|chafaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chafaz|chafaz]] || [[word:chafaz|chafaz]] || [[word:chafaz|chafaz]] || [[word:chafaz|chafaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chafaz|th忙chafaz]] || [[word:j忙chafaz|j忙chafaz]] || [[word:sh忙chafaz|sh忙chafaz]] || [[word:k忙chafaz|k忙chafaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachafaz|thathachafaz]] || [[word:jajachafaz|jajachafaz]] || [[word:shashachafaz|shashachafaz]] || [[word:kakachafaz|kakachafaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachafaz|thachafaz]] || [[word:jachafaz|jachafaz]] || [[word:shachafaz|shachafaz]] || [[word:kachafaz|kachafaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachafaz|thachafaz]] || [[word:jachafaz|jachafaz]] || [[word:shachafaz|shachafaz]] || [[word:kachafaz|kachafaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachafaz|shachafaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachafaz|goshachafaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachafaz|gokishachafaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachafazn眉|shachafazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachafaznkn眉|goshachafaznkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachafazn眉|gokishachafazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachafazsh毛|shachafazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachafaznksh毛|goshachafaznksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachafazsh毛|gokishachafazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachafazro|shachafazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachafaznkro|goshachafaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachafazro|gokishachafazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachafazmu|shachafazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachafaznkmu|goshachafaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachafazmu|gokishachafazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachafazsher|shachafazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachafaznksher|goshachafaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachafazsher|gokishachafazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachafazng|shachafazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachafaznkng|goshachafaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachafazng|gokishachafazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachafazya|shachafazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachafaznkya|goshachafaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachafazya|gokishachafazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachafazyam|shachafazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachafaznkyam|goshachafaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachafazyam|gokishachafazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachafazn眉sh毛|shachafazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachafaznkn眉sh毛|goshachafaznkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachafazn眉sh毛|gokishachafazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachafazn眉ro|shachafazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachafaznkn眉ro|goshachafaznkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachafazn眉ro|gokishachafazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachafazn眉mu|shachafazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachafaznkn眉mu|goshachafaznkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachafazn眉mu|gokishachafazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachafazsh毛n眉|shachafazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachafaznksh毛n眉|goshachafaznksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachafazsh毛n眉|gokishachafazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachafazsh毛ro|shachafazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachafaznksh毛ro|goshachafaznksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachafazsh毛ro|gokishachafazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachafazsh毛mu|shachafazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachafaznksh毛mu|goshachafaznksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachafazsh毛mu|gokishachafazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachafazron眉|shachafazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachafaznkron眉|goshachafaznkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachafazron眉|gokishachafazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachafazrosh毛|shachafazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachafaznkrosh毛|goshachafaznkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachafazrosh毛|gokishachafazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachafazromu|shachafazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachafaznkromu|goshachafaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachafazromu|gokishachafazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachafazmun眉|shachafazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachafaznkmun眉|goshachafaznkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachafazmun眉|gokishachafazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachafazmush毛|shachafazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachafaznkmush毛|goshachafaznkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachafazmush毛|gokishachafazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachafazmuro|shachafazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachafaznkmuro|goshachafaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachafazmuro|gokishachafazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
